ddls:
CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the program */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "principal_investigators" (
  "pi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each principal investigator */,
  "pi_name" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the principal investigator */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the principal investigator */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the affiliation */,
  "research_area" TEXT /* Primary research area of the PI */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the project belongs to */,
  "pi_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator leading the project */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "targets" INTEGER /* Number of targets for the project */,
  "data" REAL /* Amount of data collected for the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "funding" REAL /* Funding allocated for the project */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the project data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_pi_id FOREIGN KEY ("pi_id") REFERENCES principal_investigators ("pi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the target belongs to */,
  "target_name" TEXT /* Name of the target */,
  "target_type" TEXT /* Type of the target (e.g., star, galaxy) */,
  "ra" REAL /* Right Ascension of the target */,
  "dec" REAL /* Declination of the target */,
  "magnitude" REAL /* Magnitude of the target */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_targets_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the publication belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the publication was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string representing user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the project */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the browser used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the collaboration belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user participating in the collaboration */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration (e.g., lead, contributor) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for threaded comments) */,
  "edited_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was last edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
